clauses.clause_text: That in consideration of the refund of the said advance of Rs ______________ in full, the parties hereby agree to mutually release and relinquish their respective rights and obligations under the Agreement, dated ____________ entered into by the parties hereto.

That pursuant to the Agreement herein, the parties hereto declare and agree that the Agreement, dated ____________, between them is hereby cancelled and rescinded and that no party shall be under any obligation thereunder.
